offer: For insurance brokers processing 5–15 policies/month, missed policy renewals cause coverage gaps. We monitor renewals instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
problem: missed policy renewals leading to coverage gaps
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for insurance brokers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar tools
DM outreach to 20-50 insurance brokers with demos
Share insights in community forums for insurance brokers
try_it: Let users explore dashboard for upcoming expirations
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Produce a demo video showcasing the manual workflow
Conduct 10 interviews with target users for feedback
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Set default reminder schedules for renewals
Enable CSV import for existing policy data
Facilitate one-click export of simple reports
